title: hieracium sparsum subsp. perfoliosum
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. perfoliosum is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as Hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Hieracium sparsum subsp. perfoliosum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant medicinally.
